var.var: I18N::translate('A report of an individual’s ancestors, formatted as a tree.')

Input.name: layout
Input.options: A4-portrait=>I18N::translateContext('paper size','A4') - I18N::translate('Portrait')|A4-landscape=>I18N::translateContext('paper size','A4') - I18N::translate('Landscape')|US-Letter-portrait=>I18N::translateContext('paper size','Letter') - I18N::translate('Portrait')|US-Letter-landscape=>I18N::translateContext('paper size','Letter') - I18N::translate('Landscape')|A3-portrait=>I18N::translateContext('paper size','A3') - I18N::translate('Portrait')|A3-landscape=>I18N::translateContext('paper size','A3') - I18N::translate('Landscape')|US-Tabloid-portrait=>I18N::translateContext('paper size','Tabloid') - I18N::translate('Portrait')|US-Tabloid-landscape=>I18N::translateContext('paper size','Tabloid') - I18N::translate('Landscape')|A2-portrait=>I18N::translateContext('paper size','A2') - I18N::translate('Portrait')|A2-landscape=>I18N::translateContext('paper size','A2') - I18N::translate('Landscape')|A1-portrait=>I18N::translateContext('paper size','A1') - I18N::translate('Portrait')|A0-portrait=>I18N::translateContext('paper size','A0') - I18N::translate('Portrait')
